confirmDialog.title: Confirm Action
confirmDialog.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?

clearWhiteboard.title: Clear Whiteboard
clearWhiteboard.message: This will remove all objects from the whiteboard. This action cannot be undone.

endSession.title: End Session
endSession.message: This will end the session for all participants. Everyone will be disconnected from this workspace.

errors.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to server after {{attempts}} attempts. Please check your internet connection or try again later.

notifications.disconnected: Disconnected from server. Attempting to reconnect...
